summary_en: Former ANC Commissioner and longtime community leader Dotti Love Wade endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for Ward 1 Councilmember, citing Jackie’s proven record of service, community leadership, and ability to get things done for residents.
summary_es: Dotti Love Wade, ex Comisionada ANC y reconocida líder comunitaria de Washington DC, respalda a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para Ward 1 por su trayectoria de servicio, liderazgo comunitario y capacidad comprobada para generar resultados para los residentes.
title_en: Dotti Love Wade Endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for Ward 1 Councilmember
title_es: Dotti Love Wade respalda a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para Councilmember de Ward 1
source: Dotti Love Wade - Former ANC Commissioner and longtime community leader
